subcodes.first_line: O ye ancient companions and firm, steadfast friends! His Honour Isfandiyár hath tasted the honeyed cup of martyrdom in the path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران دیرین و دوستان ثابت مستقیم حضرت اسفندیار شهد شهادت را در راه
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom
